curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff which adds max:500 validation rules to first_name, last_name, phone, username, and email fields in both UserCreateRequest and UserUpdateRequest. The sibling RegisterRequest.php already enforces max:255 on its fields and is not vulnerable. Kept pre-assigned integer-overflow class (CWE-190) as the advisory describes excessively large input values causing DoS, consistent with integer overflow in string length processing.
